## Summary
<!-- What does this PR change? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New product/category page
- [ ] Content update
- [ ] SEO improvement
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Styling / design update

## Checklist
- [ ] HTML passes structural validation (`python3 .github/scripts/validate.py`)
- [ ] No broken internal links (`python3 .github/scripts/check_links.py`)
- [ ] Sitemap updated if new pages added
- [ ] All new images have `loading="lazy"` and `alt` text
- [ ] Meta title is under 60 characters
- [ ] Meta description is under 155 characters
- [ ] Tested on mobile (≤375px width)
- [ ] Tested on desktop (≥1200px width)
